---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change to Halonyx
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What's the problem?
What can't you currently do, or what's awkward about the current behavior? (Skip straight to "what I want" only if there genuinely isn't a problem — most good features start from a gap.)

## What you'd like to see
A clear description of the feature or change.

## Where does it fit?
- [ ] `protocol/` — Signal Protocol implementation
- [ ] `backend/` — server, auth, database
- [ ] `frontend/` — UI
- [ ] `simulator/` — protocol explainer
- [ ] Roadmap item already listed in README (safety number QR, PQC, multi-device, group messaging, voice/video, push notifications)
- [ ] Something not on the roadmap

## Alternatives considered
Any other way to solve the same problem, and why this approach is better.

## Security implications
Does this touch key storage, session state, authentication, or anything that could weaken forward secrecy / post-compromise security? If yes, describe how you'd expect it to interact with the existing threat model in `specification_docs/security_docs/datathreat.md`.

## Additional context
Mockups, references to how Signal/other E2EE apps handle this, or anything else useful.
